testcase.name: test_login_valid_renter

failure.message:
AssertionError: Login failed: 404: This page could not be found.Gostaylo - Premium Global Rentals

404

This page could not be found.

assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = .status_code

testcase.failure:
test_reports/pytest/test_comprehensive_e2e_v25.py:456: in test_login_valid_renter assert res.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: 404: This page could not be found.Gostaylo - Premium Global Rentals

404

This page could not be found.

E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = .status_code
